name: @vahan360/api-express
description: Express control-plane API for Vahan360 ingest, auth, queues, and scrape-job enqueue.

scripts.build: node --check src/telemetry.js && node --check src/lib/activeTraceLogFields.js && node --check src/config/envSchema.js && node --check src/lib/authAllowBearer.js && node --check src/middleware/auth.js && node --check src/routes/auth.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/lib/logger.js && node --check src/lib/metrics.js && node --check src/middleware/requestContext.js && node --check src/middleware/observability.js && node --check src/lib/ingestQueue.js && node --check src/lib/bullBoardAdmin.js && node --check src/lib/redisCache.js && node --check src/utils/scrapeDate.js && node --check src/utils/scrapeRangeValidation.js && node --check src/routes/scrapeJobs.js && node --check src/routes/queues.js && node --check src/routes/workers.js && node --check src/lib/openapi.js

author: Vahan360 Team
